position.description: DataLabelPosition value that represents the position of the data label. The possible values are: None, Center, InsideEnd, InsideBase, OutsideEnd, Left, Right, Top, Bottom, BestFit, Callout.

separator.description: String that represents the separator used for the data labels on a chart.

showBubbleSize.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label bubble size is visible.

showCategoryName.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label category name is visible.

showLegendKey.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label legend key is visible.

showPercentage.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label percentage is visible.

showSeriesName.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label series name is visible.

showValue.description: Boolean value that represents whether the data label value is visible.

format.description: Represents the format of chart data labels, which includes fill and font formatting. Read-only.
